name: The Bell Tower
description:
You stand in the highest point of the Last Homely House, in a large airy room
with four open windows.  In the center of the room is a large bell, suspended
on an axis.  A large rope reaches up from the bell and over a pulley, before
returning to the ground near your feet.  The cold spring wind from the valley
blows against your skin, making you shiver.
